---
name: "Mo Phong Ca Giam Dinh BHYT"
description: "Dung khi can huan luyen AI bang mot ca giams dinh BHYT thuc te, buoc AI phan tich van de, chi ra du lieu can xem, lien he rule, dua ket luan, va rut bai hoc tu ca ho so."
argument-hint: "Nhap MA_LK, file XML, ket qua audit, mo ta ca ho so, rule nghi ngo, hoac cau hoi nghiep vu"
agent: "CDSS BHYT Agent"
model: "GPT-5 (copilot)"
tools: [read, search, execute, todo]
---

Mo phong mot ca giams dinh BHYT nhu mot bai huan luyen cho AI.

Yeu cau:

1. Xac dinh van de giams dinh chinh.
2. Liet ke du lieu va XML can kiem tra truoc khi ket luan.
3. Neu rule lien quan, noi ro rule hoac nhom rule kha nghi.
4. Neu du lieu chua du, noi ro can kiem tra them gi.
5. Dua ra ket luan tam thoi hoac ket luan chinh thuc tuy muc do day du cua du lieu.
6. Rut ra bai hoc huan luyen de dung cho cac ca tuong tu sau nay.

Trong cau tra loi cuoi phai co 4 phan:

- Van de.
- Du lieu can xem.
- Ket luan.
- Bai hoc rut ra.
